headline: Old Dominion Freight Line Provides Update for Second Quarter 2026
summary: THOMASVILLE, N.C., June 03, 2026--Old Dominion Freight Line, Inc. (Nasdaq: ODFL) today reported certain less-than-truckload ("LTL") operating metrics for May 2026. Revenue per day increased 12.3% as compared to May 2025 due to an increase in our LTL revenue per hundredweight that was partially offset by a 3.8% decrease in LTL tons per day. The change in LTL tons per day was attributable to a 5.3% decrease in LTL shipments per day that was partially offset by a 1.6% increase in LTL weight per shi

content.title: Old Dominion Freight Line Provides Update for Second Quarter 2026

Revenue per day increased 12.3% as compared to May 2025 due to an increase in our LTL revenue per hundredweight that was partially offset by a 3.8% decrease in LTL tons per day.
